name: Autoresearch Task
description: Add tests for error handling, exception paths, and failure modes across src/ modules — specifically testing what happens when external dependencies fail (network errors, disk errors, missing files), when inputs are malformed or out of range, and when resource limits are exceeded. Write 20-30 new test cases using unittest.mock to simulate failures and verify that appropriate exceptions are raised, errors are logged, and the system degrades gracefully without crashing.
